feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Daisy Edgar-Jones gaming movie "Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow" sets November 2027 release
entry.content: >Gabrielle Zevin’s best-selling novel tells the story of two friends whose lives first intersect in childhood and college, and follows them over several decades as they become creative partners in the video game business of the 1990s-2000s. The plot centers on Sadie Green, played by Daisy Edgar-Jones, a brilliant game designer, and her co-collaborator Sam Masur, as well as Sam’s roommate and friend Marx Watanabe, as they build a video game studio called Unfair Games. https://variety.com/2026/fil
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The Japanese writer who the subject of assassination.
entry.content: Ryukishi07 was the 52-year-old Japanese writer best known as the novel writer himself who the mastermind behind Anime games as Higurashi, Umineko, Rose Gun Days, Higanbana, Ciconia and other more as the influential and iconic novel games for visuals, fantastic story, mysteries, dark themes, and things like that is became popular over the years to forming When They Cry Community as the fandom community for dedicated to 07th Expansion which is prominent on the Internet inspired fan creations from

entry.title: /b/ Random: sup /b/ So I spent a lot of time on here in the late 2000s and early 2010s when …
entry.content: sup /b/ So I spent a lot of time on here in the late 2000s and early 2010s when I was in middle/high school, and as a result of all the rule 34 I developed a huge fucking thing for cartoon chicks, as well as all the weird ass fantasies that you'd expect comes with that. Now I was able to get my shit together and learned how to be normal, started banging chicks, actually got to act out a lot of my fantasies irl, etc. Basically I thought it was behind me. Then last night I got drunk and decided to
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I won in life
entry.content: I'm the heir of the throne. My dad is so proud of me. My mom is so proud of me. My sister is so proud of me. My vassals are so proud of me. I'm going to marry a beautiful princess from a foreign kingdom. (A few years later...) I have beautiful fair children now. My life is so perfect. My life is flawless.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: wow Jimmy really redeemed himself by doing that big grandstand in the final epis…
entry.content: wow Jimmy really redeemed himself by doing that big grandstand in the final episode... Except he literally destroyed Bill Oakley's career completely as a second-no, actually maybe third, or fourth thought? Even though Bill took his case when literally no one else would. But he gets his career NUKED by Jimmy's little display so Kim can go back to getting YUP'd. And no one fucking cares about Bill. Because he's bald and ugly huh? Fuck him right?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /news/ News: Drudge Report Rundown Part 39
entry.content: The House of Representatives voted to keep traditional Daylight Savings time the law of the USA. IBM stocks crater after earnings warnings… > https://www.cnbc.com/2026/07/14/ibm -warns-second-quarter-earnings-fell -short-of-expectations.html 68 Billion Dollars wiped out in hours! > https://www.telegraph.co.uk/busines s/2026/07/14/ibm-loses-68bn-in-wors t-day-on-record/ Shockwave through tech - AI warning! > https://www.foxbusiness.com/technol ogy/ibm-sends-shockwave-through-tec h-industry-ai-war

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Can't we use AI to create emulators?
entry.content: >Get a few unreal engine 5 games. >Here are the binaries of those games for PC >Here are the binaries of the same games for PS5 >Find where the code execution diverts, and create a tool to connect a PS5 code into the windows code. >Get an exclusive PS5 game, profit. It should be this easy no?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Windows features that Linux doesn't have: Native video casting
entry.content: How to cast a video from your laptop to your connected display without having to interact with the display or media player: Windows: >just right click the MKV file and select "cast to device" >select which device to cast to >video is beamed to display and begins playing immediately >enjoy video! Linux: >right click MKV file on your Linux desktop >become confused because it's 2026 and Linux can't cast video natively >google around for an hour or two to find out how to cast a video from your deskt
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: We're gonna be rich! Rich! Rich!
entry.content: https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/14/d eepseek-reportedly-in-talks-to-rais e-1-5b-then-ipo/ >July 14 (Reuters) - Chinese AI startup DeepSeek is weighing raising new funds one month after closing its first round and has begun preparations for an initial public offering, according to media reports on Tuesday. >The company started preliminary talks this week with new investors about opening another round that would value the company at about $71 billion before the deal, according to the Financial Time
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /news/ News: House passes Trump-backed bill that would make daylight saving time permanent
entry.content: https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/co ngress/house-passes-bill-daylight-s aving-time-permanent-sunshine-prote ction-rcna587531 Efforts in Congress to make daylight saving time permanent sprang forward Tuesday after the House passed legislation that would remove the need for Americans to adjust their clocks twice a year. The measure, known as the Sunshine Protection Act, passed 308-117. It would put the country on the time currently observed from March to November unless a state exempted itself bef
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /o/ Auto: What do i need to know/learn in order to ride my aprilia tuareg safely?
entry.content: My mom only let me get this aprilia tuareg if i promised to only ride it in our neighborhood for a while. So far ive been riding very gingerly and trying to err on the side of caution but i feel like if im too cautious that is not optimal. I got a 1” lower oem comfort seat for it which i think is good bc im only 6’1 and avg lankyness. I always feel like motorcycles (at least the pretty ones) are kind of like the midget police bc midgets and ppl with short arms/legs cant touch the ground when the
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Early FC History
entry.content: The [s4s] national soccer team played their first match on July 12, 2013, against the /gd/ board in the 2013 Summer Cup Friendlies. A total of 301 fans witnessed the new team go 3-0 down before Shrek grabbed a consolation goal, which turned out to be their first goal in their club history. [s4s] met /b/ eight days later in another 2013 Summer Cup Friendly. The match, packed with action and butthurt on the /b/ side, saw [s4s] grab their first win in their history with a 1-0 win. Quads scored the
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /news/ News: Elon Musk’s $1M Wisconsin voter giveaway likely was illegal, panel finds
entry.content: https://thehill.com/homenews/state- watch/5968466-elon-musk-election-br ibery/ A bipartisan elections panel found that billionaire Elon Musk likely violated Wisconsin’s election bribery law when he handed out $1 million checks to voters during the state’s Supreme Court election last year. The Wisconsin Election Committee voted 5-1 last week to refer two complaints against Musk to the Brown County district attorney’s office after finding probable cause that the giveaways broke the state’s electio
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: A fanbase that lacks gatekeeping will bring people with this kind of humor into …
entry.content: A fanbase that lacks gatekeeping will bring people with this kind of humor into it.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: "Escapism bad" doesn't work as a message when the world the character is escapin…
entry.content: "Escapism bad" doesn't work as a message when the world the character is escaping to is an actual physical place. At that point, it's no different from moving to another state or country.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Fabiola Navarrete
entry.content: Do you realize her last name is spelled with only one t as in Navarrete? Did she or her parents change it to make it more French sounding? Also her real first name is Danielle, which is actually french, the Spanish form would be Daniela, just like her actual middle name, Fabiola. Btw, I haven't seen her anywhere else but in /tv/, neither do I plan to, her name just bothers me and her nickname (Inde as in "independent") is pure cringe and totally made up by her. She's 100% cap just like her teeth
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump slashes size of parkland on two national monuments by 90%
entry.content: https://www.kuer.org/politics-gover nment/2026-07-13/trump-shrinks-bear s-ears-grand-staircase-escalante-ut ah For the second time in the past decade, two Utah national monuments have had their protections dramatically reduced by the Trump administration. Flanked by Utah’s full delegation, the governor and the state’s Speaker of the House, President Donald Trump signed two proclamations to shrink Grand Staircase-Escalante National Monument by around 90%, and Bears Ears National Monument by 91%.
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /hdgg/ - Human Domestication Guide General, 222nd Bloom
entry.content: General for discussion of Human Domestication Guide & related fiction. trips-bloom edition >What is HDG? HDG is a collective kink writing project about the Affini (an advanced precursor civilization from outer space), who aggressively care for every other species in the universe. They have finally turned their glittery eyes on future grimderp hypercapitalist nightmare humanity. Using their natural charisma and various classes of Xenodrugs, they aim to make Florets (d̶o̶c̶i̶l̶e̶,̶ ̶d̶r̶u̶g̶ ̶a̶d̶
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /news/ News: Darline Graham, sister of Lindsey Graham, sworn in to fulfill his Senate term
entry.content: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news /2026/jul/14/darline-graham-nordone -south-carolina-senator Darline Graham, the sister of the late Republican senator Lindsey Graham, was sworn in to temporarily fill his Senate seat on Tuesday, just three days after his sudden death. Graham was appointed by Henry McMaster, South Carolina’s governor, to fill the remainder of her brother’s current term. Graham arrived in the Senate chamber, accompanied by Republican senators Tim Scott of South Carolina and Kati
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The modern man can no longer die a dramatic death. He dies in a hospital room, l…
entry.content: The modern man can no longer die a dramatic death. He dies in a hospital room, like a bee inside a honeycomb cell. That's how I see it, at least. Death in the modern age, whether due to illness or accident, is devoid of drama. We live in an age in which there is no heroic death. We who live today, however, imagine death, but I wonder if we're even really living.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8370 Shy Dom Edition Previous Thread: >>84071975 F-list …
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8370 Shy Dom Edition Previous Thread: >>84071975 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles,

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Give it to me straight. Will I, as a grown man, be seen as a pervert if I went t…
entry.content: Give it to me straight. Will I, as a grown man, be seen as a pervert if I went to see My Neighbor Totoro in the cinemas? Will people in the cinemas be judging me that I am watching this movie? I am terrified of going to see this movie alone.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /b/ Random: anyone have tips on dealing with trauma.
entry.content: I’ve been carrying a secret for over a decade, and I’m tired of the weight. Between the ages of 8 and 12, I was sexually abused by an uncle. He used his position to manipulate me, telling me I was "special" and that what we were doing was a secret. I was a child, and I was terrified, so I just froze. He made me feel like I was part of something he called "pretty," but it was abuse, and it was wrong. He hurt me in ways that stay with me every day. Even now, I struggle with flashbacks, memory gaps
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: It's more than a feeliiiiing
entry.content: It's more than a feeliiiiing
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /int/ International: Does it make sense to learn any other languages?
entry.content: I already speak Spanish (obviously) and English with perfect fluency. I'm also polishing and finishing up my French because my mom made me start learning when I was a teen and I see it as unfinished business. If I don't really plan on moving anywhere, does it make any logical sense to take up any other language? Considering that almost everything important is translated into English and that it will probably remain the lingua franca of the world for as long as I'm alive (currently early 20s).
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International
